cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the father did when he was laid off. The choices are (A) was angry with his boss, (B) didn't care, (C) couldn't accept easily, (D) was happy. Looking at the passage, the first part says the narrator thought the dad was joking, but then realized it was true. The father is described as a hard worker who was proud of his career. After losing his job, he was home all day, searching for jobs on the computer. The narrator noticed he was down and his self-esteem was affected. The father also asked his kids to spend less money. So the dad was clearly upset and struggling with the situation. He even decided to start his own business later. So the correct answer should be (C) couldn't accept the fact easily because he was down and his self-esteem was
